patch.value: changelog generate returned {error} (exit 0) on bad flags; plain throw on --check

Extension returned { error } for invalid --group-by/--mode (runtime treats as success → exit 0) and threw a plain Error on --check. Now throws PmCliError with EXIT_CODE from the SDK (pm-changelog resolves @unbrained/pm-cli at runtime). Bad flags exit 2, out-of-date exits 1 via clean command_failed envelope; single invocation.
Replaced return{error}/plain-throw with PmCliError carrying EXIT_CODE
Bad flags exit 2; --check out-of-date exits 1 with single invocation
Fixed via PmCliError + EXIT_CODE from SDK; verified bad flags exit 2, --check exits 1, 44 tests pass.
